TOCEntry.description:
One entry in the table of contents.

Carries pre-computed ``first_order_index..last_order_index`` bounds so
"every chunk in this section" and "every chunk between section A and
section B" are cheap range queries — never tree walks plus label
matching.

first_chunk_id.description: chunk_id with the smallest order_index inside this section.
first_chunk_id.title: First Chunk Id

heading_chunk_id.description: The section_heading or appendix chunk this entry points at.
heading_chunk_id.title: Heading Chunk Id

id.description: Stable identifier for the TOC entry — e.g. 'toc-1.2.3'.
id.title: Id

last_chunk_id.description: chunk_id with the largest order_index inside this section.
last_chunk_id.title: Last Chunk Id

TOCEntry.title: TOCEntry

description:
Hierarchical table of contents derived from the PDF outline and
cross-checked against section_heading chunks. Written to ``toc.json``.
title: TOC
